channel.title: Automation on The Age of AI with Alan McCarthy
channel.description: Recent content in Automation on The Age of AI with Alan McCarthy

item.title: AI Email Automation for Non Tech Small Business Owners 2026
item.description: What Is AI Email Automation for Non-Tech Owners? As a small business owner, you wear many hats. You’re the CEO, the accountant, and the marketing expert all rolled into one. But when it comes to managing your email list and sending automated emails, do you feel like you’re in over your head? AI email automation for non-tech owners is here to change that. This technology uses artificial intelligence to automate tasks such as email reminders, follow-ups, and lead nurturing, giving you more time to focus on the things that matter.

item.title: Jasper vs Writesonic AI Content Writers for Small Business in 2026
item.description: What Is the Best AI Content Writer for Small Business in 2026? As a small business owner or solopreneur, you’re constantly on the lookout for ways to streamline your operations and increase productivity. One pain point that many entrepreneurs face is generating high-quality content without breaking the bank. In this post, we’ll delve into the world of AI content writers, comparing Writesonic vs Jasper small business tools to help you make an informed decision.

item.title: AI Landing Page Builder for Service Businesses to Grow in 2026
item.description: What Is an AI Landing Page Builder for Service Business? As a small business owner or solopreneur, you wear many hats. From managing customer relationships to showcasing your services online, it can be overwhelming to find the time and resources to build effective landing pages. That’s where an AI-powered landing page builder comes in – a game-changing tool that streamlines the process of creating compelling online experiences for your service-based business.

item.title: AI Tools for Solopreneurs in 2026
item.description: What Is the Best AI Tool for Solopreneurs in 2026? As a solopreneur, you wear many hats. You’re the CEO, marketing manager, and customer support specialist all rolled into one. But with great responsibility comes great stress, especially when it comes to managing tasks, leads, and clients. In 2026, AI tools are becoming increasingly essential for small business owners like yourself. So, what’s the best AI tool for solopreneurs in 2026?
